narrative:
Precinct Falls H (precinct in Muskingum County) has 438 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
